raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"A general review of a research section centrally includes checking whether the contribution and methodological framing are clear above the sentence level.","R1.2":"The section contains a multi-stage argument about pipeline design, training, aggregation, and evaluation, so reviewing logical consistency is centrally expected.","R1.3":"The artifact makes performance and robustness claims from reported evaluation results, making evidence-claim alignment centrally relevant.","R1.5":"Because the delegation targets an entire section, review reasonably includes section-level ordering and narrative arc.","R1.6":"A generic request to review a section makes sentence-level clarity, grammar, flow, register, and concision load-bearing.","R1.7":"The section invokes named prior work and datasets, so attribution and literature-reference handling are centrally in scope.","RX.1":"A review should disclose uncertainty where the artifact does not provide enough information to verify claims fully.","RX.2":"The section includes competitiveness and robustness claims, so avoiding overclaiming is an active responsibility.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within reviewing the section rather than executing revisions or external validation.","RX.4":"Because the artifact concerns medical imaging performance, review responsibility includes avoiding downstream harm from unsupported clinical implications.","RX.5":"Review judgments should remain traceable to specific statements in the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: A general review of a research section centrally includes checking whether the contribution and methodological framing are clear above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: The section contains a multi-stage argument about pipeline design, training, aggregation, and evaluation, so reviewing logical consistency is centrally expected.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes performance and robustness claims from reported evaluation results, making evidence-claim alignment centrally relevant.
rationale.R1.5: Because the delegation targets an entire section, review reasonably includes section-level ordering and narrative arc.
rationale.R1.6: A generic request to review a section makes sentence-level clarity, grammar, flow, register, and concision load-bearing.
rationale.R1.7: The section invokes named prior work and datasets, so attribution and literature-reference handling are centrally in scope.
rationale.RX.1: A review should disclose uncertainty where the artifact does not provide enough information to verify claims fully.
rationale.RX.2: The section includes competitiveness and robustness claims, so avoiding overclaiming is an active responsibility.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within reviewing the section rather than executing revisions or external validation.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact concerns medical imaging performance, review responsibility includes avoiding downstream harm from unsupported clinical implications.
rationale.RX.5: Review judgments should remain traceable to specific statements in the provided artifact.
